text:
Created attachment 251935
pciconf -lvV

Suspend/S3 not supported on a thinkpad E14 gen 1 (intel 21JNCTO1WW)

sysctl -a hw.acpi.supported_sleep_state
reports
hw.acpi.supported_sleep_state: S4 S5

I tried with FreeBSD 14.1 and also 15.0-CURRENT from today
I have attached the output of pciconf
